contacts.title: Managing Director
contacts.other_contact_detail: Hotel main line +44 20 7781 8888; General email: london@rosewoodhotels.com (route via front desk or reservations for commercial inquiries)

contacts.contact_evidence_summary: Dedicated official bio page on Rosewood site plus LinkedIn and multiple news features confirming current role. Strong public profile enables routing through property contacts.

evidence.quote_or_fact: Currently, the Managing Director of award-winning Rosewood London, Tessa Gorman brings a wealth of expertise in global luxury travel.
